description: Register a DuckDBPandasIOManager so assets are automatically stored in and loaded from a local DuckDB file

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Dagster resource key for this IO manager. Use 'io_manager' to make it the default.

database.label: Database
database.description: Path to the DuckDB database file, e.g. 'data/warehouse.duckdb'

schema_name.label: Schema Name
schema_name.description: Schema within the DuckDB database for asset tables

name: DuckDB IO Manager
